title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
